scripts.check:auth: npm.cmd run test:auth && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:assignment-quiz: npm.cmd run test:assignment-quiz && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:classroom-core: npm.cmd run test:classroom-core && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:economy-shop-ledger: npm.cmd run test:economy-shop-ledger && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:live-game: npm.cmd run test:live-game && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:negamon-battle: npm.cmd run test:negamon-battle && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:negamon-reward-audit: npm.cmd run test:negamon-reward-audit && npm.cmd run predev

scripts.check:board-social: npm.cmd run test:board-social && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.check:billing-plan: npm.cmd run test:billing-plan && npm.cmd run predev

scripts.check:student-dashboard: npm.cmd run test:student-dashboard && npm.cmd run predev
scripts.build: npm run clean && node scripts/prisma-generate-build.mjs && next build && tsc --project tsconfig.server.json
scripts.test:auth: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --pool threads src/__tests__/auth-credentials-authorize.test.ts src/__tests__/auth-core-callbacks.test.ts src/__tests__/verify-email-route.test.ts src/__tests__/auth-config-authorized.test.ts src/__tests__/oauth-intent-route.test.ts src/__tests__/resend-verification-route.test.ts src/__tests__/complete-oauth-route.test.ts src/lib/auth/__tests__/callback-url.test.ts src/lib/auth/__tests__/post-auth-destination.test.ts src/__tests__/register-route.test.ts src/__tests__/profile-route.test.ts src/__tests__/user-settings-route.test.ts src/__tests__/folders-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/sets-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/notifications-route.test.ts src/__tests__/classrooms-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-groups-skills-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-students-assignments-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/omr-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-analytics-route.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-tail-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/user-upgrade-route.test.ts src/__tests__/admin-register-route.test.ts src/__tests__/rate-limit.test.ts src/lib/authorization/__tests__/resource-access.test.ts
scripts.test:assignment-quiz: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --pool threads src/__tests__/quiz-integrity.test.ts src/__tests__/quiz-step-routes.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/validate-manual-assignment-score.test.ts src/__tests__/teacher-assignment-overview-service.test.ts src/__tests__/teacher-assignments-overview-route.test.ts src/__tests__/teacher-assignment-overview-load.test.ts src/__tests__/teacher-assignment-overview-request-gate.test.ts
scripts.test:classroom-core: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --pool threads src/__tests__/classrooms-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-group-scores-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-groups-skills-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-students-assignments-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-points-attendance-contract.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-points-authorization.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-dashboard-access.test.ts src/__tests__/dashboard-classroom-page.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-tail-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-tab-loaders.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-audit-log-routes.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-analytics-assignment-stats.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-analytics-route.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-selection-flow.test.ts src/__tests__/classroom-dashboard-component.test.ts src/__tests__/student-manager-dialog.helpers.test.ts src/__tests__/ui-error-messages.test.ts
scripts.test:omr: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --pool threads src/__tests__/omr-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/omr-sets-route.test.ts src/__tests__/omr-scanner-fallbacks.test.ts
scripts.test:question-sets: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --pool threads src/__tests__/set-editor-messages.test.ts src/__tests__/upload-route.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/question-set-schema.test.ts src/__tests__/sets-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/folders-route-auth.test.ts src/__tests__/ai-import-routes.test.ts
scripts.test:student-dashboard: node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --pool threads src/__tests__/student-login-code.test.ts src/__tests__/student-login-code-route.test.ts src/__tests__/student-sync-route.test.ts src/__tests__/student-checkin-route.test.ts src/__tests__/student-passive-gold-route.test.ts src/__tests__/student-notifications-route.test.ts src/__tests__/student-notifications-validation.test.ts src/__tests__/student-quest-ledger.test.ts src/__tests__/student-economy-command-routes.test.ts src/__tests__/student-shop-ledger.test.ts src/__tests__/join-classroom-action.test.ts src/__tests__/student-dashboard-board-tab.test.ts src/__tests__/student-dashboard-client.test.ts src/__tests__/student-dashboard-header.test.ts src/__tests__/student-dashboard-main-tabs.test.ts src/__tests__/student-dashboard-page.test.ts src/__tests__/student-dashboard-sidebar.test.ts src/__tests__/student-home-page.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:negamon-reward: playwright test -c playwright.asn.config.ts -g "Negamon reward re-sync smoke"
